articles.author: Al Jazeera
articles.title: Qatar net late goal against Swiss to secure historic first World Cup point - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Asian Cup holders Qatar level in injury time to draw 1-1 with Switzerland in World Cup 2026 opening game.
articles.content:
Boualem Khoukhi scored an equalising goal on a header in the fourth minute of stoppage time, and Qatar spoiled a dominant day by Switzerland in a 1-1 draw in Group B of the World Cup.
Several of the… [+2832 chars]
